recipe.solutionCode:
from pathlib import Path
import base64
import runpy

_FILES = {
    'main.py': 'cHJpbnQoIlNtYXJ0IFRhc2sgVHJhY2tlciIpCnByaW50KCJBcmNoaXRlY3R1cmUgcmVhZHkiKQo=',
    'README.md': 'IyBTbWFydCBUYXNrIFRyYWNrZXIKCkEgZmluYWwgT09QIGNhcHN0b25lIHdpdGggbW9kZWxzLCBzZXJ2aWNlcywgdGVzdHMsIGRhdGEsIGFuZCByZXBvcnRzLgo=',
}

for _path, _data in _FILES.items():
    _file = Path(_path)
    _file.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    _file.write_text(base64.b64decode(_data).decode('utf-8'), encoding='utf-8')

runpy.run_path('main.py', run_name="__main__")

recipe.solutionCode:
from pathlib import Path
import base64
import runpy

_FILES = {
    'main.py': '',
    'README.md': 'IyBTbWFydCBUYXNrIFRyYWNrZXIKClRoaXMgY2Fwc3RvbmUgdXNlcyBlbmNhcHN1bGF0aW9uLCBhYnN0cmFjdGlvbiwgaW5oZXJpdGFuY2UsIGFuZCBwb2x5bW9ycGhpc20gYWNyb3NzIGEgbXVsdGktZmlsZSBQeXRob24gYXBwLgoKUnVuIGBtYWluLnB5YCB0byBsb2FkIHRhc2sgZGF0YSBhbmQgd3JpdGUgYHJlcG9ydHMvc3VtbWFyeS50eHRgLgo=',
    'models/base_task.py': '',
    'models/bug_task.py': '',
    'models/feature_task.py': '',
    'services/reports.py': '',
    'data/tasks.txt': 'YnVnfEZpeCBsb2dpbnxoaWdofG9wZW4KZmVhdHVyZXxFeHBvcnQgQ1NWfHJlcG9ydHN8ZG9uZQo=',
    'services/storage.py': '',
    'tests/check_models.py': '',
    'tests/check_services.py': '',
    'models/__init__.py': '',
    'services/__init__.py': '',
    'tests/__init__.py': '',
    'reports/summary.txt': 'VGFzayBTdW1tYXJ5CkJVRzogRml4IGxvZ2luIChoaWdoKSBbb3Blbl0KRkVBVFVSRTogRXhwb3J0IENTViAocmVwb3J0cykgW2RvbmVdCk9wZW4gdGFza3M6IDEK',
}

for _path, _data in _FILES.items():
    _file = Path(_path)
    _file.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    _file.write_text(base64.b64decode(_data).decode('utf-8'), encoding='utf-8')

runpy.run_path('main.py', run_name="__main__")
